action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the high-level status of the power grid, including frequency, total demand, total generation, and stability index.

action_set_definitions.name: list_generation_assets
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all power generation units currently connected to the grid and their unique identifiers.

action_set_definitions.name: get_asset_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific technical constraints and current state for a particular generation unit.

unit_id.description: The unique ID of the generation unit.

action_set_definitions.name: set_generation_output
action_set_definitions.description: Requests a change in the power output for a specific generation unit. The change is subject to the unit's ramp rate.

unit_id.description: The unique ID of the generation unit.

target_mw.description: The desired power output in Megawatts.

state_description.grid_frequency_hz: The current operating frequency of the grid. Nominal is usually 50.0 or 60.0 Hz.
state_description.total_demand_mw: The current aggregate consumer load across the entire grid in Megawatts.
state_description.generation_units: List of power plants and their current operating parameters.
state_description.substations: Status of distribution nodes and potential load-shedding points.
state_description.stability_index: A calculated health score from 0.0 (Blackout) to 1.0 (Stable).
